summary: The diff adds a new React hook (useActorDiagnostics) that computes actor readiness/loading/error from the React Query cache with change-detection guards to avoid redundant state updates, plus documentation/state summary updates. However, there is no evidence in the provided diff summary that the Daily Entry page (or its draft preview) was updated to use this hook or otherwise fix the specific infinite update loop causing React error #185.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix the infinite update loop that triggers “Minified React error #185 / Maximum update depth exceeded” on the Daily Entry page in the draft preview so the page renders normally without the root-route “Something went wrong” fallback.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff summary shows no modifications to the Daily Entry page component(s) or draft preview code path where the render loop occurs—only a new helper hook was added. Without evidence of integrating the fix into the Daily Entry page or removing the loop source, this requirement is not demonstrably implemented.
evidence: frontend/src/hooks/useActorDiagnostics.ts (only code change shown; no DailyEntryPage change evidenced)
frontend-file-summaries.txt (is a summary file, not evidence of actual page code changes in this diff)

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure reactive backend-connection/actor readiness UI state used by the Daily Entry page does not continuously set React state when there is no effective change, preventing maximum update depth regressions.
missing_requirements.reason: While the new hook includes guards to avoid setting state when values are unchanged, the diff summary does not show that the Daily Entry page (or any readiness UI used by it) was updated to use this hook or otherwise apply the guarded update logic. Therefore the requirement is only partially addressed at best, with no demonstrated wiring into the Daily Entry page.
evidence: No diff evidence for frontend/src/pages/DailyEntryPage.tsx integration

hallucinated_features.description: Added a 'retry' function that invalidates all React Query 'actor' queries.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-44 requests preventing continuous state updates and ensuring readiness indicators update once per state change; it does not explicitly request adding a retry API. This may be useful, but it is an extra behavior beyond the stated requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: Added/updated a production smoke test checklist document including steps for 'Clear Form' and 'Copy for Vendor'.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest focuses on fixing a React crash and avoiding readiness state loops; adding a production smoke test document (and steps for features not mentioned in the request) is not requested by REQ-43/REQ-44.
